New Roles:
  - Starspawn (Neutral Pariah)
  - Sorceress (Coven)

# New Keybinds:
  - F5 + F : Fix Blackscreen (Host and Moderator only)

# Changes:
  - Reworked Witness to see both Murder and Trespassing (interacting with a player who isn't the same alignment)
  - Made Crusader and Jinx unable to kill each other
  - Changed Sidekick to become Jackal if Jackal loses their role
  - Changed Bard to get random jokes instead of Chinese stuff

# Fixes:
  - Fixed update checker not working for full releases
  - Fixed several bugs related to CustomNetObjects (Bomber, Abyssbringer, etc...)
  - Fixed a bug where Rat info could not be heard by Eavesdropper
  - Fixed Jackal Sidekick chaining bug
  - Fixed Romantic murder-suicide creating a body if it happens during meeting
  - Fixed Overclocked not applying correctly
  - Fixed President not revealing to crew correctly
  - Fixed task win not working
  - Fixed Abyssbringer, and other CustomNetObjects
  - Fixed Gangster can recruit Coven
  - Fixed Glitch Mimic duration using Shapeshifter duration instead
  - Fixed a bug where Copycat would lose addons on copy (mostly)
  - Fixed a bug where Necronoview saw Trickster as Neutral
  - Fixed Rebirth chaining
  - Fixed Cursed Wolf not working against all roles it should
  - Fixed Lovers Suicide causing a crash
  - Fixed Bloodmoon Countdown not updating
  - Fixed Ghoul not working
  - Fixed Cultist cooldown
  - Fixed Dead Agitator getting OiiAi as the OiiAi dies to bomb on meeting report getting stuck sudo-dead
  - Fixed Zombie being able to get speed addons
  - Fixed an error caused by Benefactor
  - Fixed Converted God causing game to end with no winners
  - Fixed Monarch spending a use when trying to knight a cleansed player
  - Fixed weird corner cases with Bloodmoon
  - Fixed Benefactor breaking other roles

# Hotfix 1 Fixes:
- Fixed host getting kicked for "hacking" due to rate limit
- Fixed /load reloading too many times"}

Among Us Version 17.1.0 -- Please Fresh Install This Update to prevent any issues
** Offline Practice Mode Does NOT Work on the Epic Games Version at this time **

### This release includes a good amount of changes for all players to enjoy, and some that may not be taken very lightly. 
The main changes are as follows: 
- Modded Hide and Seek is available in TOU Mira, with 4 roles and 5 modifiers!
- Seer, Altruist, and Egotist have been reworked, so feel free to check them out!
- Some TOU roles have been renamed, to allow vanilla roles to be alongside them. We know this is a bit of a tough pill to swallow, but only four roles are affected by this change!
- New map options overall
- New hats!
Rest of the changes can be seen in the in-game changelog. Happy Thanksgiving!"}

Version: v3.1.4 ## Downloads * [Download from GitHub](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/releases/download/v3.1.4/Better-CrewLink-Setup-3.1.4.exe) ## FAQ - What voice server do you recommend? **->** I recommend the voice server `https://bettercrewl.ink` for the best support. (fixes NAT issues) - My NAT is strict how can I play? **->** Enable NAT FIX in the settings. - Is there a Discord for support? **->** Yes you can join, https://discord.gg/ctVu4fw9qR - How to use the mobile version? **->** Read info here: [Better-Crewlink mobile](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewlink-mobile/releases/latest) - Is there a Mirror? **->** Yes you can find it here: [BetterCrewlink Mirror](https://mirror.bettercrewl.ink/) - How to setup the OBS Overlay? **->** https://i.imgur.com/zjvevBu.png For more questions/help you can join our Discord server:
## Changes Logs ### 3.1.4 * Add floormap for Fungle map * Add mod support for Town of Us Mira ### 3.1.1 * Removed submerged floormap * Added initial support for new map * Added fix for longer names due to TMPro tags by @JKohlman in https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/pull/359 ### 3.1.1 * Support for new Among us version. ### 3.1.0 * Fixed mute button issues by @JKohlman * Finished optimizing all SVG sizes by @JKohlman * Fixed overflowing username box by @JKohlman * Add support to all Crowdin languages by @MatadorProBr * Impostor radio shortcut crashes BCL by @JKohlman * Added a slider to adjust ghost volume for impostors by @JKohlman **If you find a issue please just report on [Discord server](https://discord.gg/qDqTzvj4SH) or [GitHub](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/issues) or DM me on Discord ([ThaGuus#2140](https://discordapp.com/users/508426414387757057)) so we can fix it. If we don't know the bug we won't fix it**
## Linux To install it on Linux go to the installation guide for Linux by [clicking here](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/wiki/Installation#linux). ## Notes - This is an unofficial fork of CrewLink, for any problem, question, issue or suggestion you have with **Better**CrewLink talk to us on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/qDqTzvj4SH), [GitHub](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/issues) or message the developer on Discord ([ThaGuus#2140](https://discord.com/users/508426414387757057)), do not report any problems to The official Discord or GitHub of normal and official CrewLink as they will not help you. - We are not affiliated with CrewLink, we are just a modified/better version of the original CrewLink, so if you need help with CrewLink, we will not offer any help for you about CrewLink here, we will only help you if you are using **Better**CrewLink, if you want to download BetterCrewLink look at the [GitHub](https://github.com/OhMyGuus/BetterCrewLink/releases/latest).
The original/normal CrewLink is now discontinued and that means the original/normal CrewLink will never be updated and will never work again, so BetterCrewLink is the only way to make your CrewLink works ![CrewLink has been discontinued](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/71022656/121688157-84197500-ca99-11eb-869e-6af3b720d2eb.png)

two new lobby settings that enhance the "Meetings/Lobby Only" voice mode:

### 1. Ghosts can Talk Ingame
- **Requirement**: Can only be enabled when "Meetings/Lobby Only" is enabled
- **Functionality**:
  - Allows ghosts to talk and hear each other during the game (TASKS state)
  - Ghosts can hear each other anywhere on the map (distance-independent, like meetings)
  - Ghosts can hear alive players during grace period (if enabled)
  - In meetings, ghosts can hear both alive players and other ghosts

### 2. Grace Period
- **Requirement**: Can only be enabled when "Meetings/Lobby Only" is enabled
- **Functionality**:
  - Customizable delay (0-10 seconds, 0.5s increments) before voices are cut off
  - Applies when transitioning from LOBBY -> TASKS, LOBBY -> DISCUSSION, or between TASKS <-> DISCUSSION
  - Prevents abrupt voice cutoff when games/meetings start
  - Allows both hearing and talking during the grace period

- Updated to Among Us v17.1

This version of Submerged requires the following dependencies:
| Dependency | Version |
|:-:|-|

Otherwise, if you have Among Us on Epic or Microsoft Store, you need the `Unity (IL2CPP) for Windows (x64) games` version.
>

-> v2025.5.12 MANUAL UPDATE REQUIRED

_Patch Notes_

- Updated to Among Us v16.0.2
- Added the very popular Draft Mode!!! :D
- Added Version Compatibility Checker (will now let you know your on the wrong Among Us Version)
- Adjust a lot of tournament log stuff (Thank you Vanellus and Comp Players for your feedback)
- Added a "Stop Countdown" button to the lobby
- Added some Easter Eggs (check the trash) :D 
- Reset Region button should now fix your region file as well as your settings.amongus file to allow you to go back to a previous version easier
- Implemented some Anti-Cheat things
- Removed Custom Region (for now)

_Bug Fix Zone_

- Fixed Assassin crashing everyone's game when last impostors misfires
- Fixed Sleepwalker getting stuck outside the map on Airship & Fungle
- Fixed Watcher Spawning on Fungle
- Fixed Undertaker Lag Dragging
- Fixed End Game Stats being different for clients vs host when a player disconnects
- Fixed Tournament Game Timer instantly ending the game on start
- Fixed Imp Chat Freaking out and should now close properly instead of having to double close it manually
- Fixed dying in meeting overlay being under the nameplates
- Fixed a TON of null references and small bugs that you wont know the difference besides less lag and smoother gameplay. (it just mainly helps me) :D 

Thank you everyone who has waited patiently and thank you to everyone that has tested the small versions in between for me. I don't get much time to code or play anymore but I'm happy as long as you all are happy. Maybe I can finally get to adding more roles lol. Also I know a lot of you are asking about Language compatibility and I'm sorry we don't have plans for this any time soon. We wish we could do this, we really do, its just not in the immediate future."}

EN
 - Updated to Among Us version v16.0.2
 - Added new role Doomsayer, thanks to Tukuai
 - Added new mode Draft Mode
 - Added new modifier for the Guesser gamemode, Last Impostor
 - Added a last game summary in the lobby
 - Added new option to allow the Shifter to shift the medic shield as well
 - Added new option for the Seer to see the teams of the flashes
 - Added new option to allow the Bait to be unguessable
 - Added new option for the Watcher to see the Yasuna votes in the voter's color
 - Added new option for the Detective to track the killer's movements
 - Added new option to allow the Archaeologist to reveal a certain role for a configurable amount of players
 - Added a new achievement for the Trapper
 - Added a page button for the Guesser
 - The Archaeologist can now become a Madmate
 - The Sherlock can now see the usage of the buttons indicated with an arrow of the Impostors
 - The Bomber can now plant bomb on their partner's target
 - The Portalmaker can now see the teleportation places of the users
 - Fixed a bug where the Impostors will replace the Jackal's victory if only the Schrodinger's Cat is alive
 - Reworked Mayor and it now can now vote a configurable amount of votes
 - Fixed a bug where the Fox crashes the game
 - Deleted Prophet as it works like the Fortune Teller
 - Deleted the option for everyone to notice extra victims
 - Deleted the option to add a vitals on Mira

### ZH
- 升级至Among Us v16.0.2
- 增加新职业末日预言家，感谢土块
- 增加新模式轮抽选角
- 增加赌怪模式新副职业绝境赌怪
- 增加大厅可见的复盘信息
- 增加新选项“交换师可以交换护盾”
- 增加新选项“灵媒可以区分击杀阵营”
- 增加新选项“诱饵可以被猜测”
- 增加新选项“窥视者可以看见裁决者特殊投票”
- 增加新选项“侦探追凶”
- 增加新选项“考古学家发掘文物出现人数”
- 增加设陷者成就
- 增加会议中赌怪猜测UI的翻页按钮
- 考古学家现在可以变成叛徒（即原生背叛的考古学家）
- 福尔摩斯可以通过箭头检测内鬼阵营的异常行为
- 双子爆破者现在可以向迷你船员或另一个双子爆破者的爆破目标放置炸弹
- 守门人可以在会议信息中检测玩家的传送地点
- 修复豺狼阵营的薛定谔的猫杀死内鬼后内鬼会胜利的问题
- 修复狐妖会使游戏崩溃的问题
- 市长现在拥有更多的票数
- 删除与占卜师重复的预言家

o/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ThetaHalo/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ThetaHalo/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ThetaHalo/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ThetaHalo/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"content_type":"application/x-zip-compressed","state":"uploaded","size":61907868,"digest":"sha256:2daaaaf2ae957fd14881b84c94565dbe51564308d8b45cd35dd9ec79e0c78511","download_count":1548,"created_at":"2025-09-16T04:21:16Z","updated_at":"2025-09-16T04:21:44Z","browser_download_url":"https://github.com/Lotus-AU/LotusContinued/releases/download/v1.5.0/Lotus.v1.5.0.Steam.zip"}],"tarball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/Lotus-AU/LotusContinued/tarball/v1.5.0","zipball_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/Lotus-AU/LotusContinued/zipball/v1.5.0","body":"**We have an option in game to automatically post lobbies to the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/projectlotus).**
**To enable, go into the new custom lotus-themed options menu. Under Ventlib Tab, you will see an option that says:**
**"Open Room to Discovery"**
**Upon remaking your lobby, you should see it in the PL [Automatic Lobbies Thread](https://discord.com/channels/1017870413545607209/1311898296813486141).**

## Notice:
Please restart your game after the first launch of the mod, there is currently a bug where the game will get stuck trying to end the game and your GUI buttons will flash. This only occurs on the first launch of the game after installing the mod.

# Major Additions
### Commandless Guessing
Guessing (Guesser subrole & Dedicated Guesser Roles (Vigilante, Assassin, Pirate)) now use the Shapeshifter in meetings instead of chat.
Guessed players now show up instantly as they are guessed instead of the end of the meeting. If more than 1 player dies by a guesser, they will all show up in chat.
## New Among Us Update Support
v1.5.0 will work on Among Us **2025.9.9** (or 17.0.0, as called in-game).

## Minor Additons
- Added Viper & Detective Roles (they can be used alongside modded roles)
- Added New Colorwars Option: Sudden Death
- Added New CTF Option: Overtime on Ties
- Added New Arsonist Option: Douse Cooldown
- Added New Arsonist Option: Ignite Cooldown
- Added New Arsonist Option: Can't Douse/Ignite when other is on Cooldown
- Added Kill Cooldown option to Necromancer
- Added 19 New Role Buttons & 7 New Role Icons
- Added New Gameplay Option: "Killing Crew Can 1v1 Imp/NK"
- Added "Killer CD after Manipulate" to Manipulator
- Added "Killer CD after Puppet" to Puppeteer

# Minor Changes
- Changed "Can Protect Same Player Twice in a Row" Medic Option to only appear when Medic's "Change Guarded Player" option is set to "Meetings"
- Changed Last Resort's reminder message to no longer appear when the player is revealed
- Changed CTF Flag spawn for Mira HQ
- Changed Guesser Subrole & Dedicated Guesser Roles to use Shapeshifter in meetings
- Changed Necromancer to no longer be able to pet to convert
- Changed arcanepool#7728's Global Tag
- Rich Text is no longer stripped from text when sending to vanilla clients
-  Changed Guesses to no longer be able blocked by protection roles

# Bug Fixes
- Fixed bug where Arsonist's kill cooldown is halfed after dousing a player
- Fixed bug where a Medic Option had wrong display name
- Fixed bug where Freezer target wouldn't become unfrozen until next meeting if freezer disconnected
- Fixed bug where RogueCopyCat couldn't kill after 16.0.0 Among Us update
- Fixed bug where Deathknight couldn't use their ability (fixed by @CitrionDragon in #11)
- Fixed bug where Deathknight doesn't change if Necromancer disconnects
- Fixed bug where Deathknight doesn't change if Necromancer is exiled
- Fixed bug where Copycat still spawned in as shapeshifter
- Fixed some role buttons having stray black lines due to asset bundle compressing
- Fixed bug where History/Combo menu would show up when a custom net object is spawned
- Fixed bug where Sudden Death arrows in Colorwars wouldn't update position
- Fixed bug where Shapeshift Cooldown would be 0.1s if you had modifiers
- Fixed bug where Modded Clients could vent during Comms Sabotage
- Fixed bug where Roles that Guard & Kill having half cooldown
- Fixed bug where "Disable Task Win" option did nothing
- Fixed bug where Jackal always recruited on first kill
- Fixed bug where /fix [ID] start would try to fix the person who sent the command
- Fixed bug where Ninja would sometimes get stuck after using hunt ability
- Fixed Juggernaut for host always having the cooldown of the last kill
- Fixed bug where Impostor wins would ignore Non-Impostor based NKs  (fixed by @CitrionDragon in #16)
- Fixed Phantom Vanishing not working if Phantom wasn't the Phantom Role for Host
- Fixed Investigator settings having the opposite effect

# In-Dev Changes
- Fixed bug where Guessers could no longer vote if meeting ended while they were in guessing mode
- Fixed bug where Guessers remained as Shapeshifter if they initiated guessing more than once
- Fixed bug where Arsonist would only ignite 1 person at a time
- Fixed bug where Guesser could come back alive after mis-guessing
- Fixed a broken image after 2025.9.9 Update
- Fixed Viper softlocking the game

# Known Bugs
- **Rarely**, players may blackscreen at the start of the game or after meeting. The cause of this is usually ping.
- **Sometimes**, Mastermind may still kill you even if you already killed someone else.
- **Rarely**, players may be teleported into walls. The cause of this is usually roles like Escapist where you mark positions too close to walls.
- **Rarely** when shapeshifting, players might still have their original name.
- Romantic's win-condition may bug out sometimes, meaning you won't win with your partner.
- Players cannot sabotage Crash Course on Airship.
- Most translations aren't 100% complete.

# For The Future
This release is just a **preview of what’s to come**—we’re still actively developing new features and improvements.
Here is list of things we plan to include in the future.
- Fungle Support (you can *apparently* play the map right now, but there are issues so please don't bother reporting)
- Updating Modded Client Compatibility
- Add more Languages
- Add New Roles & Other Content

**If you are developer, you can actually add your own content without modifying PL!**
We have added support for addons, and you can learn more info at this [GitHub Repo](https://github.com/Lotus-AU/SampleLotusAddon)!
You can check out addons made by others from the [#community-content](https://discord.com/channels/1017870413545607209/1311955640528146492) forum channel.

**If you are a translator, you can add languages!**
We have a [repository](https://github.com/Lotus-AU/Languages) dedicated for language files. Check it out if you are interested!

---

Welcome back to Lotus!
#### [Website](https://lotusau.top) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/projectlotus)

#### Post-Release Note:
If you downloaded v1.5.0 before Sept 16th at 5 AM UTC, you didn't download the updated language files. The release has been re-uploaded with those files included. If you're one of these people, please download the `lang_English.yaml` file and put it in your `Among Us/Languages/Lotus` folder, thank you.","mentions_count":1}

Complete Overhaul!

### New Features
- Prop Hunt is now a part of Hide and Seek
- Prop Hunt config can be changed in the settings
- You can now move props with SHIFT and the movement keys!
- Impostor Vision is now entirely dark around corners
- Impostors have a time penalty when missing props
- Props are correctly visible in the Fungle fog
- Compatible with `2024.10.29`

### Removed Features
- Infection mode is disabled (at least for now) with the rewrite
- Removed impostor miss amount
- Removed noclip button

### Issues Fixed
Can no longer clip through walls (#1)
Compatible with latest version (#5)

🚀 **NewMod v1.2.8 – Changelog**  

📅 **Release Date:** 23/10/2025  

---

Today, I'm announcing **NewMod v1.2.8**, a meaningful update. Let’s dive in!  

---

## 🆕 **New Role**
- 🕶️ **Shade**: Deploy a shadow field that grants invisibility and lethal power within its darkness. (Configurable in settings)

---

## 🐞 **Bug Fixes**
- Addressed an issue where **Visionary screenshots** were not displayed on Android (thanks @XtraCube).  
- Fixed an incorrect description for the **Drowsy** modifier.  
- Fixed an issue where the **Adrenaline** modifier did not have its own description.  
- Addressed a potential issue where players could be disconnected.

---

## ✨ **Changes & Additions**
- **FalseForm** is now a **Timed Modifier**.  
- Updated **MiraAPI** to **v0.3.3**.  
- Updated to **AU v17.0.1** for Android/PC players.  
- Added two new local settings: *Buttons on the left for Android* and *Disable birthday cursor*.
- Introduced two new visual effects:  
  - 🌑 **ShadowFlux** *(used for Shade)*  
  - 🌊 **DistortionWave** *(used for Beacon)*  

---

📜 **Full Changelog:** [View on GitHub](https://github.com/CallOfCreator/NewMod/compare/V1.2.7...V1.2.8)  

---

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> To run NewMod v1.2.8, you **must install both MiraAPI.dll and NewMod.dll**.  
> - If you use the **Launcher**, only reinstall `MiraAPI.dll` (NewMod.dll is already updated).  
> - Manual installs require both DLLs in the `BepInEx/plugins` folder.  

> [!NOTE]  
> - The last version (v1.2.7) had disconnection issues when playing with a minimum of 4 players. I've made significant changes to the neutral amount system, which should fix it. If not, new logs have been added to help identify the issue.
> - **V1.2.8** is the last version before the next biggest update of NewMod (v1.3.0). V1.2.9 **may** release if an urgent bug is found.
> - **For Android players**: Starlight has not yet been updated for v17.0.1, which means NewMod is currently not working on Android. An update will be coming soon to address this and allow you to play on Android!

---
🎮 Thanks again to everyone supporting **NewMod**!
---
Please keep reporting feedback and suggestions on **GitHub** or **Discord**. Can't wait for you to experience the next biggest update (you're definitely going to like it)!","mentions_count":1}

# 📝 Release Notes
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/astra1dev/AUnlocker/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2
- Fix `DontShowCosmeticsInGame` freezing the game (#62)
- `UnlockCosmetics` now shows all bundles as owned and cosmicubes as 100% completed (before, cosmicubes would show as 0% completion even tho the cosmetics from it are unlocked and usable)
- Add `ButtonSize`: resize the in-game buttons (like Use, Kill, Report, etc.)
- Add `ChatHistoryLimit`: Modify the maximum amount of chat messages to keep in the chat history
- `UnlockAprilFoolsMode` and `EnableHorseMode` are now combined together with Seeker and LongHorse into one `AprilFoolsMode` option (#63)
- Add chat recall: scroll through previous chat messages using up and down arrow keys (#69)

# 💾 Installation
Read [this section](https://github.com/astra1dev/AUnlocker?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation) for installation instructions.
- If you have Among Us on **Steam or Itch.io**, download `AUnlocker_v1.2.2_Steam_Itch.zip`

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed players being alive after death in Hot Potato
- Fixed revived players being bugged sometimes

## Changes
- Players near the Bloodmoon are alerted

## Additions
- New role: Carrier (Crewmate Miscellaneous)
- New role: Berserker (Neutral Killing)
- New setting in Mingle: `Maximum Winning Players`
- New settings under `Random Maps Mode`: `Minimum Players for Airship`, `Minimum Players for Fungle`
- Added special main menu for holidays (you'll see it starting December 1)

---

## Pull Requests
* Refactor Russian.txt with new content and formatting by @HyperAtill in https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles/pull/406
* Improve README presentation with refined sections and improved visual layout by @ZypherusKhan in https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles/pull/407
* New Crowdin updates by @Gurge44 in https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles/pull/405

## New Contributors
* @ZypherusKhan made their first contribution in https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles/pull/407

AmongUs v17(v2025.9.9)/AmongUs v17.0.1(v2025.10.14)対応版になります ### 右上の[Sponsorボタン](https://github.com/sponsors/yukieiji)からGitHubのスポンサー登録して、支援していただければ非常に開発が捗ります
また月100ドルの支援達成で高機能ハイスペックなExtremeRoles専用カスタムサーバーを運営予定です
## リリースデータ - Extreme Roles v2025.11.9.0 - Extreme Skins v2025.9.10.12(バージョン変更のみ) - Extreme Voice Engine v2025.6.25.24(バージョン変更のみ) ## 現在使用できない機能 - カスタムサーバーのIPとポート番号の入力をゲーム中に行う機能 - 対応までConfigファイルの直接的な編集をお願いいたします ## 現在確認されている不具合 - バニラAmongUs本体で想定されている死亡時のペット処理とMODの処理が異なっている不具合 - 想定されている挙動も出来るようにオプションを後日追加予定 ## 不具合修正 - ポーラスで「追放を確認」をチェック、「追放する陣営」がインポスター以外のときにインポスターとそれ以外がわかってしまう不具合の修正 - 公式サーバーで死体を通報するとキックされる不具合の追加修正 - 公式サーバープレイ時にMODであることを示すAmongUs内部バージョンになるように調整を行いました - カスタムサーバー使用時には前の仕様と同じになるようにしているため、問題ないです - ギャンブラー - オプション名の接語尾が間違っている不具合の修正 - バーター - 「キャスリング」使用時に特定の票数が計算されていない不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.10.26のリリースノート ## 不具合修正 - v2025.10.24の改善により、インポスター以外の初期キルクールの設定が反映されておらず、キルクールが0秒から始まってしまう不具合の修正(バランスを著しく崩壊させる不具合) - ゾンビ - 能力が発動できず、正しく復活できない不具合の修正 - サブマージド連携 - 対応版サブマージドを導入した時、正しく起動しない不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.10.24のリリースノート ## 改善 - ゲームの進捗管理システムをAmongUs本体の処理から切り離し独自に実装を行いました - これに伴い、今までスポーン時の秒数がきちんと取得できず曖昧な秒数でしか設定できなかった問題がほぼ完全に解決します - ただし、ゲーム処理の**ラグの都合上1秒程度のラグが絶対に発生します** - この調整に伴い**ヤンデレ、マイナー、ロウワーに存在しているスポーン後特定の処理をブロックする秒数のオプションの調整及び見直しをお願いします** - 役職のコードを一部刷新を行いより疎結合になるように調整しました ## 不具合修正 - バニラサーバーで死体を通報するとBANされたりキックされたりする不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.10.14のリリースノート ## 改善 - 情報表示ビューに閉じるボタンを追加し、より直感的に操作できるように改善(#657 ) - 能力ボタンでチャージ率が100%になった時にSEがなるように改善 - この改善により、チャージ率を常に見る必要がなくなり直感的に操作できるようになったと思われます - ボクサー - 「ストレート」使用時に役職の人と飛ぶ対象の人にSEが鳴るように調整 - これにより設定によってはきちんと飛んでるかわからない設定でも使って、当たったということがわかるようになります - 内部コードを一部改善 ## 不具合修正 - ロウワー - 会議開始時のタイマーリセットが正しく行われていない不具合の修正 - イントロ中にタイマーがカウントされてしまう不具合の修正 - この2つの不具合に関しては現状暫定的な不具合対処になります、次のアップデートにて完全的な修正を行います - ボクサー - 「ストレート」で飛んでいる人が能力ボタンを使用できてしまう不具合の修正 - アイアンメイト - 公式役職の「バイパー」でキルした死体の一部エフェクトが残ってしまう不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.10.9のリリースノート ## 改善 - 一部役職のステータスを別クラスへ移譲し疎結合になるように調整しました ## オプション追加 - ヘレティックに以下の会議ボタン周りの設定を行えるオプションを追加 | 追加オプション | 初期値 | 詳細 | | --- | --- | --- | | 「緊急会議」ボタンが使用可能になるタスク進捗率 | 100％ | タスクを持つかがオンの時に設定可能、この進捗率以上のタスクを完了した時、会議ボタンを押すことができる | ## 不具合修正 - 会議中にボタンを持つ役職の一部でスキップボタンに能力のボタンが表示される不具合の修正 - デリュージョナー - 能力ボタンが使用できず、それによって様々な不具合を引き起こしていた不具合の修正 - ヒィプノティスト - 一部役職の能力の計算が間違っており、「能力のかけら(赤)」の設置数が少なくなっていた不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.10.2のリリースノート ## 改善 - 情報表示画面にトグルボタンを追加し、全役職等で設定済みの役職だけを表示できるようになりました #645 - 警告レベルを上昇させより安全かつ高速なコードになるように調整 - バーター - オプション「「キャスリング」先を他のプレイヤーに表示させるか」をよりわかりやすい「「キャスリング」の交換先(予定)を他のプレイヤーに表示させるか」というテキストに変更 ## 不具合修正 - ヘレティック - 「インポスターが「呪殺」の対象になるか」が「オン」にしても、対象に取ることができなかった不具合の修正 - バーター - 「キャスリング」の使用回数計算が間違っていた不具合の修正 # 以下v2025.9.29のリリースノート ## 仕様変更 - チャージ能力が100％で打ちやすいように100％の持続時間を1秒から2.5秒へ増加 - これによりボクサーやスカベンジャーがより使いやすくなると思われます - ボクサー - 方向を計算できない時、役職プレイヤーが向いている方向に対して飛ばすように調整 - この仕様変更と下記不具合修正に伴い、能力を使ったのに動作していないように見えてしまうことが基本的になくなると思います ## 不具合修正 - 役職のキル時に動作する処理が一部動作していなかった不具合の修正(想定されているバランス等を満たすことができない不具合) - この不具合修正に伴いイビルバーターの覚醒処理が動作していなかった不具合が修正されます - ボクサー - 「ストレート」を発動し、そのプレイヤーの加速処理を行った際に満たしやすい特定条件下時に即加速処理が解除され見た目上動作していないように見えてしまう不具合の修正(ゲーム体験を損ねる不具合) # 以下v2025.9.28のリリースノート ## 不具合修正 - スキップへ入れた票が別の人の票として表示され、その人への投票が正しく表示されない不具合の修正(表示上の問題) - ボクサー - 「ストレート」で飛んでいる最中にベントボタンが使用でき、それによりキルを防ぐことができた不具合の修正(想定外かつバランスを大きく崩壊させる不具合の修正) - ベントを使用しようとしたプレイヤーに対して「ストレート」を使用すると、使用回数だけ消費される不具合の修正(想定外かつUXを損なう不具合の修正) - アクセラレーター - 「加速パネル設置」中にベントに入れてしまう不具合の修正(ゲーム性を大きく崩壊させる不具合) - バーター - バーターを使用すると票の計算が正しくなくなる不具合の修正(ゲーム性を大きく崩壊させる不具合) - スワップした時のアニメーションが正しくない不具合の修正(表示上の問題) # 以下v2025.9.27のリリースノート ## 不具合修正 - 内部バージョンがリリースノートとズレていた不具合の修正(表示上の問題) -
